'''Ilum''' was an [[Iron Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] and, after the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], joined the [[New Jedi Order]].

==Biography==
A female [[Shard (species)|Shard]] from [[Orax]], Ilum and her twelve children dwelt in the bodies of [[Juggernaut war droid]]s, [[FLTCH-series battle droid]]s, and [[Uulshos justice droid]]s. They were trained in the ways of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on [[Dweem]] by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Aqinos]], without the approval of the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]], beginning in [[60 BBY/Legends|60 BBY]]. Nonetheless, under the name "the [[Iron Knight]]s," they fought valiantly in the [[Arkanian Revolution]] alongside [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] in [[50 BBY/Legends|50 BBY]]. Afterwards, they were excommunicated from the Jedi Order by the Jedi Council but made [[High Marshal]]s by the [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]]. Ilum and most of the Iron Knights retreated to Dweem with Aqinos; she remained in hiding on [[Dweem]].<ref name="Droids, Technology and the Force" />

[[Callista Ming]] provided [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] with clues as to the location of the hiding Iron Knights. Around [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], a group of Jedi students found them on Dweem, and they joined the [[New Jedi Order]]. They defeated the [[Red Knights of Life]] on [[Osarian]] and [[Uffel]] and [[Attack on Kligson's Moon|saved]] [[Kligson's Moon/Legends|Kligson's Moon]] from the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. They [[Battle of Kalarba|fought]] in defense of [[Hosk Station/Legends|Hosk Station]], during which one of Ilum's children, [[Luxum (Jedi)|Luxum]], fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] and led a group of [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]] against the Yuuzhan Vong.<ref name="Droids, Technology and the Force" />
